description_long: This apple is round and plump, with a smooth, glossy skin that displays a blend of red and yellow-green hues. The surface is mostly unblemished, with subtle streaks and speckles of red running vertically along the skin. A short, brown stem protrudes from the top, slightly off-center, adding to its natural appearance. The apple's coloration transitions from a deeper red on one side to a lighter yellow-green on the opposite, suggesting ripeness and freshness. Its skin appears taut and firm, with a slight sheen that reflects light. The overall shape is slightly asymmetrical, giving it a realistic, hand-picked look.
description: A round, glossy apple with red and yellow-green skin, featuring a short brown stem and subtle streaks.
description_view_0: Red and yellow-green skin with a visible stem, mostly red on top.
description_view_1: Deep red dominates, stem is centered, minimal yellow-green visible.
description_view_2: Red and yellow-green blend, stem slightly angled, streaks more pronounced.
description_view_3: Mostly yellow-green with red streaks, stem visible, less red overall.
